category_sources: Official GitHub README says ingress2gateway translates Ingress and provider-specific resources to Gateway API resources.
source_facts.description says it converts Kubernetes Ingress resources to Kubernetes Gateway API resources.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and source_facts.name use ingress2gateway.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface.
Official GitHub repository contains a docs directory and links docs/emitters.md from the README.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/ingress2gateway; per instruction, repo returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: Official README describes providers, emitters, and Gateway API translation.
source_facts.description identifies Kubernetes Ingress to Gateway API conversion.
source_facts.executables lists ingress2gateway as a CLI executable.
